pokemon:sinistea.name: Sinistea
pokemon:sinistea.summary: The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.
This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.

pokemon:polteageist.name: Polteageist
pokemon:polteageist.summary: Leaving leftover black tea unattended is asking for this Pokémon to come along and pour itself into it, turning the tea into a new Polteageist.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Leaving leftover black tea unattended is asking for this Pokémon to come along and pour itself into it, turning the tea into a new Polteageist.
This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Leaving leftover black tea unattended is asking for this Pokémon to come along and pour itself into it, turning the tea into a new Polteageist.
